headline: Suazo Business Center Receives $600,000 Grant From the KeyBank Foundation
summary: Funds will expand entrepreneurship program CLEVELAND, OH / ACCESS Newswire / April 24, 2026 /Suazo Business Center, a Utah‑based nonprofit focused on economic empowerment through entrepreneurship, has been awarded a $600,000 grant from the KeyBank ...
